vocab.example: The most noticeable change is the algorithmic refinement that now tailors my news feed to my specific professional interests.

vocab.meaning: khả năng tương thích đa nền tảng
vocab.example: Many sites I frequent have improved their cross-platform compatibility, making the transition from desktop to mobile much smoother.

vocab.meaning: các chiến lược kiếm tiền/thương mại hóa
vocab.example: I've observed a shift in their monetization strategies, with an increasing number of articles now hidden behind aggressive paywalls.

vocab.meaning: tối giản hóa trải nghiệm người dùng (từ lúc truy cập đến lúc đạt mục đích)
vocab.example: Recent updates have aimed to streamline the user journey, reducing the number of clicks needed to reach the checkout page.

vocab.meaning: sự thay đổi toàn diện về mặt thẩm mỹ/giao diện
vocab.example: The educational portal I use recently underwent a massive aesthetic overhaul, adopting a much more contemporary and vibrant look.

vocab.meaning: nội dung do người dùng tạo ra
vocab.example: There has been a significant surge in user-generated content on the site, shifting the focus from editorial pieces to community discussions.

vocab.meaning: các giao thức bảo mật quyền riêng tư nghiêm ngặt
vocab.example: In response to new regulations, the website has implemented more stringent privacy protocols to protect visitor data.

vocab.meaning: sự dễ dàng trong việc điều hướng
vocab.example: The integration of a more robust search bar has greatly enhanced the navigational ease of the online archive.

vocab.meaning: các tính năng tiêu tốn nhiều băng thông (ví dụ: video 4K, hiệu ứng nặng)
vocab.example: With the rise of 5G, many platforms are incorporating bandwidth-intensive features like high-definition auto-play videos.
I've noticed more interactive elements such as live polls and real-time comment sections being added to keep users engaged.
